preview_boundary_summary.calculators: Sanity-checked preview/design-assist calculators; physical validation remains user responsibility.
preview_boundary_summary.materials: Local curated preview catalog; not a production-grade optical constants database.
preview_boundary_summary.adapters: Adapter-native source/monitor mappings are preview metadata; real results require explicit solver execution.
preview_boundary_summary.application_domains: Benchmarks verify deterministic routing, missing-input diagnostics, and blocked actions, not physical correctness.
preview_boundary_summary.sub_agents: Sub-agent traces show deterministic local role execution, not independent autonomous services.
preview_boundary_summary.pypi: PyPI publication would not imply production-grade validation.
